steps.title: Identify the key description
steps.content: The passage explicitly calls these entries “fictitious” and “hoaxes perpetrated as jokes.” The blank needs a word that names what these false entries ARE once recognized.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the blank
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "made-up things" — the passage calls these entries "fictitious" and "hoaxes perpetrated as jokes." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — analyses: "recognized as analyses" — analyses means detailed examinations or studies; a factual analysis is not a hoax. ✗
  • Choice B — fabrications: "recognized as fabrications" — fabrications means invented falsehoods, directly matching "fictitious" entries created as jokes. ✓
  • Choice C — enhancements: "recognized as enhancements" — enhancements means improvements; fake entries do not improve Wikipedia. ✗
  • Choice D — revelations: "recognized as revelations" — revelations means newly disclosed truths; these entries are lies, not truths. ✗
B is correct.
